title: Quick and Healthy Air Fryer Vegetables for Busy Weeknights
promptIMG: Food photography: air fryer vegetables, appetizing presentation, natural lighting, kitchen setting, documentary style, realistic colors --ar 4:3 --quality 2
description: These air fryer vegetables are a game-changer for quick, healthy meals. Tossed in olive oil and spices, they cook in just 15 minutes. Perfect for busy weeknights or as a colorful side dish!
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the broccoli, bell peppers, and zucchini.
Drizzle the olive oil over the vegetables and sprinkle with garlic powder, paprika, salt, and pepper. Toss until evenly coated.
Place the vegetables in the air fryer basket in a single layer, ensuring they aren't overcrowded.
Cook for 12-15 minutes, shaking the basket halfway through, until the veggies are tender and slightly crispy.
Remove from the air fryer and serve immediately, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
tips: When using the air fryer, don't overcrowd the basket; this ensures even cooking and crispiness. If you want to switch things up, try adding a splash of soy sauce or lemon juice for extra flavor. Leftovers can be stored in an airtight container in the fridge for up to 3 days and reheated in the air fryer for a few minutes.

structured_content.content: Let me tell you, these air fryer vegetables have changed the way I approach quick dinners! I love how vibrant and flavorful they turn out, and the best part? They’re ready in just 15 minutes! Perfect for those busy weeknights when you want something healthy without spending hours in the kitchen.

For this recipe, you’ll need some fresh veggies like broccoli, bell peppers, and zucchini. They all cook beautifully in the air fryer and maintain their crunch. If you have other veggies on hand, feel free to mix and match! Carrots or asparagus would work great here too.

Cooking these veggies is as easy as tossing them in a bowl with some olive oil and spices. The air fryer does the magic, cooking them evenly while giving them that delightful crispiness. Just remember to shake the basket halfway through to ensure everything cooks perfectly!

upload.context: Colorful air fryer vegetables on a rustic wooden table

structured_content.content: These air fryer vegetables are so versatile! Serve them alongside grilled chicken or fish for a complete meal, or toss them into a salad for some extra crunch. You can even add a sprinkle of cheese right at the end for a delicious twist. Enjoy!
